subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1915-05-03
subcodes.first_line: Whosoever I send to America must at first gain the regenerative power of the second birth, be baptized with the water of universal ideals and be a living torch of the Fire of the Love of God
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the power of words; of speech, @words vs deeds, @love as fire, @the state of enkindlement in teaching
